case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MONTGOMERY, JACQUELINE Y.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,356.85 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MONTGOMERY, JACQUELINE Y. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTGOMERY, JACQUELINE Y. $1,356.85 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,382.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MONTGOMERY, JACQUELINE Y. NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTGOMERY, JACQUELINE Y. $2,865.69 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,865.69
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MONTGOMERY, JACQUELINE Y.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $25.30 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,508.14 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MONTGOMERY, JACQUELINE Y.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-04-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-20-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
